** DONE Article with snippets                            :blog:mytest:
CLOSED: [2026-01-10 Fri 14:00]
:LOGBOOK:
- State "DONE"       from ""           [2026-01-10 Fri 14:00]
:END:
:PROPERTIES:
:CREATED:  [2026-01-10 Fri 12:00]
:ID: 2026-01-10-snippet-article
:END:

This is an article that uses snippets.

I say CLOSED: [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:LOGBOOK:
- State "DONE"       from ""           [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:END:
:PROPERTIES:
:CREATED:  [2026-01-01 Wed 09:00]
:ID: snippet-greeting
:END:

Hello, dear reader to everyone.

CLOSED: [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:LOGBOOK:
- State "DONE"       from ""           [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:END:
:PROPERTIES:
:CREATED:  [2026-01-01 Wed 09:00]
:ID: snippet-block
:END:

This is the first paragraph of the block snippet.

This is the second paragraph of the block snippet.
